title: cyperus iria var. paniciformis
intro: Cyperus iria var. paniciformis, also known as Jwaranash, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family, native to tropical Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus iria var. paniciformis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and support digestive health, as well as its potential to help manage blood sugar levels and lower cholesterol. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powder, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
